message:
feat(core): add instance-binding verification and CWT target_instance support

fcp-core/capability: Add instance-ID binding check during capability
verification (step 3.5) — if a token carries an INSTANCE_ID claim, the
verifier now rejects tokens not bound to the current instance, preventing
cross-instance capability token replay. Also adds InstanceId::display test,
updates rate_limit pool_name test fixture to "shared.pool", and improves
Provenance::elevated_with test to verify elevation_token is captured.

fcp-crypto/cose: Add target_instance() builder method on CwtClaims and
CapabilityTokenBuilder so callers can bind tokens to a specific connector
instance at issuance time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
